message: Welcome to the Distributed Crawler API!

endpoints.description: Start crawling a URL. Example request body: {"url": "http://google.com"}
Get the total number of items in the Redis queue.
Extract the next URL from the Redis queue. Example request: /next?count=1

example_usage:
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"url":"http://google.com"}' http://localhost:8080/add-url
curl http://localhost:8080/status
curl http://localhost:8080/next?count=1
